hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a unified compliance layer to structure onboarding, link customer and corporate data, and preserve audit-ready evidence across digital asset risk workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Onboarding risks increase without unified control
problem_description: Executive teams face limited visibility and slower decision-making when onboarding processes for customers and corporate clients remain fragmented across multiple providers. This hinders consistent risk management, delays compliance review, and weakens audit readiness for critical onboarding decisions.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects onboarding data from multiple providers into one operational workflow that gives executives clear visibility into customer risk, case status, decision records and audit-ready evidence.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to approval decisions
workflow_description: SFTY organizes KYC and KYB provider results into risk-based review workflows that lead to documented decisions and auditable onboarding approval.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another onboarding tool. Provider-neutral compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects onboarding provider outputs into structured workflows, decision logs, evidence and reports, giving executives clear visibility and control over enterprise compliance risk.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured onboarding workflows, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence within a secure, governed, enterprise-grade compliance environment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise onboarding control workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how onboarding workflows connect customer and entity data
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves onboarding decision history

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer to oversee onboarding, risk management, and auditability across customers and corporate clients in digital asset workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY control onboarding workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures onboarding by connecting KYC, KYB, sanctions and screening outputs into configurable workflows with audit logs, risk-based routing and case management for clearer operational control.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider results and evidence packages to support audit readiness and traceable compliance decisions across onboarding and related workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, and screening providers into one vendor-neutral operational layer without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace onboarding or KYC providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace onboarding or KYC providers but integrates their outputs into structured workflows and compliance cases for efficient review and evidence preservation.
final_title: Structure enterprise onboarding into controlled workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY connects customer and corporate data into audit-ready onboarding cases and risk controls for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
